tspan.style: font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;font-weight:normal;font-stretch:normal;font-size:24px;font-family:'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif;-inkscape-font-specification:'Open Sans, verdana, arial, sans-serif, Normal';font-variant-ligatures:normal;font-variant-caps:normal;font-variant-numeric:normal;font-variant-east-asian:normal
